channel.title: Mental Game Monday - My Mental Caddy™
channel.description: Your weekly mental game tip to help you think better, recover faster, and play golf with more confidence.

item.title: Mental Game Monday - June 20, 2026
item.description:
This Week's Mental Cue

"You can walk off 18 proud without playing perfect."

Why It Matters

Some of your proudest rounds may include grinding, recovering, and staying patient.

Do This On Your Next Shot

Before the round ask: “What would make me proud of how I showed up today?”

Take the Mental Game Quiz →
